description: NHVR Bridge App — read-only smoke-test OAuth2 client. Uses client-credentials flow with a Viewer-scope foreign reference against the main nhvr-bridge-app XSUAA instance. Used by the scheduled BTP smoke-test workflow to hit the backend without a human login.

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.SmokeTest
scopes.description: Marker scope for the smoke tester — not used for access control, exists so the client has at least one granted scope to obtain a token.
